Hero.subtitle: Specialised accounting, tax and labour services for individuals and businesses — over three decades of experience in Attica.

About.label: Philosophy
About.pullQuote: Numbers tell a story. Our job is to tell it right — with precision, transparency, and no surprises.
About.paragraph1: Since 1993 we've stood beside individuals and businesses with one principle: every file is unique. We don't apply templates — we study, plan, and propose solutions that hold up under audit.
About.paragraph2: Our office combines academic background (University of Piraeus) with constant updates on one of Europe's most fluid tax landscapes. That means fewer errors, fewer penalties, and more legal benefits for you.

Services.label: Services
Services.title: Everything you need,
Services.s1Desc: Single & double entry bookkeeping, balance sheets, VAT, periodic filings, financial statements under Greek GAAP and IFRS.
Services.s2Desc: Tax returns (E1, E2, E9), ENFIA, debt restructuring, tax planning, audit support and appeals.
Services.s3Desc: Payroll, social security (APD), employment contracts, hiring & termination, ERGANI, labour disputes and HR advisory.
Services.s4Desc: We handle benefit applications (Α21, housing, heating, social tariff, unemployment etc.) via DYPA, AADE and IDIKA, as well as lease agreements and other digital procedures via gov.gr.

Process.label: Our methodology
Process.title: How we work,
Process.step1Desc: Free consultation. We listen to your needs, review the essentials, and set clear goals.
Process.step2Desc: Assessment of your tax position, identification of risks and opportunities, a tailored plan.
Process.step3Desc: We handle filings, bookkeeping and obligations with strict deadlines and full documentation.
Process.step4Desc: Monthly reports, updates on legal changes, audit support throughout the year.

AadeNews.label: Updates from AADE
AadeNews.title: Whatever drops,
AadeNews.subtitle: Latest press releases from AADE, fetched live from aade.gr. We stay informed, so you don't have to.
AadeNews.empty: The AADE feed is unavailable right now.

Testimonials.label: Client voices
Testimonials.featuredQuote: We've worked together for 14 years. On every tax change he briefed us before anyone else did. He's the first I call for a dilemma — and the last I'd ever replace.
Testimonials.t1Quote: Professional office, always on time, no surprises. They saved me penalties other accountants had missed.
Testimonials.t2Quote: I moved my books here in 2019. The difference vs. the previous office was night-and-day — clear communication and transparent fees.
Testimonials.t3Quote: Human approach, deep expertise. Saved us through a 4-month tax audit.

Faq.label: Frequently asked
Faq.title: The things people ask us.
Faq.q1: How much does the first meeting cost?
Faq.a1: The first introduction is free and lasts about 30 minutes. The goal is to understand your needs and see if we can help.
Faq.q2: Do you work with individuals or only businesses?
Faq.a2: Both. We equally serve freelancers, individuals with assets, SMEs and Greek SAs.
Faq.q3: Can you handle a client in another region?
Faq.a3: Yes. With secure digital infrastructure (myDATA, ERGANI, Taxisnet) we serve clients across Greece and abroad.
Faq.q4: How does the transition from another accountant work?
Faq.a4: We take over the migration end-to-end: document collection, pending items review, credential transfer and seamless handover.
Faq.a5: Monday–Friday 09:00–17:00. Urgent emails and messages are handled outside hours; Saturday appointments by arrangement.
Faq.q6: Do you offer services in English?
Faq.a6: Yes. We serve international clients and foreign residents in Greece in English, with full bilingual documentation.

Contact.label: Contact
Contact.title: Let's talk.
Contact.subtitle: We reply within one business day. For immediate help, call us.

Footer.description: Accounting & Tax office in Melissia. Services for individuals and businesses since 1993.
